case_title: AGUILAR, MARIA ALICIA vs. SCHREIBER, ERIC G. et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING RESET TO 3/14/96
